_comment: Merge each block into the matching committed MCP config: `claude` -> .mcp.json mcpServers, `cursor` -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, `codex_toml` -> append to .codex/config.toml. Read-only is the `--access-mode=restricted` flag (parse + read-only transaction). Provide DATABASE_URI for a READ-ONLY Postgres role via your environment / secret manager — do NOT hardcode a password in committed config (see SETUP.md).
